calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karen Farnsworth, #5162.

Petitioners Da He Li & Shu Fang Wu were present in pro per as Guardians ad Litem for the minor Ying Yi Li, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioners and the minor were placed under oath and examined.
Zhi Zhi Ye was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioners.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Joanna Li.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
